bauhaus-bold.name: Bauhaus Bold
bauhaus-bold.description: Pure off-white surface, primary-blue accent, and chunky Archivo Black display type. Bauhaus / brutalist modernist — best for opinionated manifestos and bold product pitches.
bauhaus-bold.descriptionZh: 净色底 + 主色蓝强调色 + Archivo Black 黑体. 包豪斯 / 布鲁塔利风格, 适合观点鲜明的演讲与产品发布.

blueprint.name: Blueprint
blueprint.description: Deep navy backdrop with cyan accent and IBM Plex Mono. Engineering blueprint / industrial schematic vibe — best for system architecture and technical breakdowns.
blueprint.descriptionZh: 深藏青底 + 青色强调色 + IBM Plex Mono. 工程蓝图 / 工业图纸气质, 适合系统架构与技术拆解.

bold-signal.name: Bold Signal
bold-signal.description: Dark gradient backdrop with a hot orange focal card and Archivo Black / Space Grotesk typography. Signature: oversized orange focal card as the stage's anchor + tabular section numbers. Built for pitch decks, product launches and statement chapters.
bold-signal.descriptionZh: 暗渐变底 + 大橙色焦点色卡 + Archivo Black / Space Grotesk 字体。签名：占位主角色卡 + 大编号制表数。适合 pitch deck、产品发布、宣言型章节。
bestFor: 产品发布 / 新品宣传

bold-signal-v2.name: Bold Signal v2
bold-signal-v2.description: The dark pitch-deck theme tuned for the FULL Vizplainer motion treatment: neon-border glow cards, breathing blue/purple-style ambient orbs (here hot-orange → magenta), shimmer sweeps, 3-state forward-flip carousel and pulsing live indicators. Punchy but smoothed easing — cinematic, never springy. The flagship demo theme for the v2 motion vocabulary.
bold-signal-v2.descriptionZh: 暗色路演主题，按 Vizplainer 动效全量调校：霓虹边光晕卡、呼吸式环境光球(此处橙→品红替代蓝→紫)、shimmer 扫光、3 态前翻轮播、脉冲实时指示点。爽脆但平滑的 ease-out，有电影感、绝不弹跳。是 v2 动效词汇的旗舰演示主题。
bestFor: 产品发布 / 新品宣传
需要强动效的宣言型章节

chalk-garden.name: Chalk Garden
chalk-garden.description: Dark slate chalkboard backdrop with handwritten Patrick Hand typography and a chalk-yellow accent. Friendly classroom / explainer vibe.
chalk-garden.descriptionZh: 深色石板底 + Patrick Hand 手写字体 + 粉笔黄强调色. 教室 / 课堂讲解风.

creative-voltage.name: Creative Voltage
creative-voltage.description: Saturated electric-blue canvas with neon-yellow accent and Syne / Space Mono typography. Signature: halftone dot pattern (retro-punk creative studio). Built for design weeks, creative-studio decks and visual culture talks.
creative-voltage.descriptionZh: 饱和电光蓝底 + 霓虹黄强调 + Syne 几何衬线 / Space Mono 等宽。签名：halftone 网点纹理（复古朋克工作室感）。适合设计周、创意工作室、视觉文化话题。
bestFor: 视觉文化 / 字体话题
复古朋克 / 街头文化

dark-botanical.name: Dark Botanical
dark-botanical.description: Premium editorial dark with elegant Cormorant italic and warm terracotta / blush / gold accents. Soft blurred light pools as the signature — magazine-cover sophistication for fashion, lifestyle, brand storytelling.
dark-botanical.descriptionZh: 高级感暗底 + Cormorant 斜体衬线 + 暖陶 / 玫粉 / 鎏金叠层。签名：柔光晕染 (blurred light pool)。气质介于时尚刊物封面与博物馆图录之间。

dune.name: Dune
dune.description: Charcoal-brown on desert sand — near-accent-less restraint. Inter sans display + Source Serif body. Architecture portfolio / gallery brochure / desert dusk aesthetic — quiet, sophisticated, design-first.
dune.descriptionZh: 炭褐当墨 + 沙底，几乎不用 accent —— 克制、高级。Inter 显示 + Source Serif 正文。像建筑作品集、画廊手册、沙漠黄昏的色温。
bestFor: 建筑 / 室内 / 空间
艺术展览 / 画廊手册
设计师 / 工作室作品集

electric-studio.name: Electric Studio
electric-studio.description: Clean white canvas with single electric-blue accent and Manrope sans throughout. Signature: 4px electric-blue accent bar baked into the bottom of the stage — corporate confidence without coldness.
electric-studio.descriptionZh: 净白底 + 单一电光蓝 + Manrope 全场。签名：贴底 4px 电蓝色块。企业感、清晰、自信，不冷漠，适合 B2B 与投资人场景。
bestFor: 企业财报 / 季度更新
行业研究 / 趋势报告

forest-ink.name: Forest Ink
forest-ink.description: Deep-forest-green ink on ivory cream — the green IS the ink. Source Serif body + Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC display. Reads like a vintage National Geographic issue — sustainable, grounded, considered.
forest-ink.descriptionZh: 深森林绿当墨（绿就是字色本身）+ 象牙暖纸。Source Serif 正文 + Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC。像旧版《国家地理》，沉稳、有呼吸感、克制。
bestFor: 自然 / 可持续 / 环保

indigo-porcelain.name: Indigo Porcelain
indigo-porcelain.description: Deep-indigo ink on porcelain white — the indigo IS the ink, not just an accent. Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans body. Academic, scholarly, like a Chinese journal of contemporary thought.
indigo-porcelain.descriptionZh: 深靛蓝当墨（靛蓝就是字色本身，而非 accent）+ 瓷白纸。Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans。学术、有深度，像蓝印花瓷器或一本当代思想期刊。
bestFor: 学术 / 研究 / 论文解读
AI / 数据 / 工程深度
技术发布会 / 严肃汇报
思想型 / 评论型长文改编

kraft-paper.name: Kraft Paper
kraft-paper.description: Deep-brown ink on kraft beige — old notebook / hand-stamped envelope. Fraunces serif + Noto Serif SC + Source Serif body. Vintage, warm, hand-crafted, with a copper accent for editorial emphasis.
kraft-paper.descriptionZh: 深棕当墨 + 牛皮米。像老笔记本或手戳信封：暖、有年代感、手作味。Fraunces + Noto Serif SC + Source Serif 正文 + 紫铜色 accent。
bestFor: 历史 / 怀旧 / 老物
手工艺 / 食物 / 农产品

midnight-press.name: Midnight Press
midnight-press.description: Warm dark backdrop with a single hot accent. Cinematic, terminal-y, developer vibe.
midnight-press.descriptionZh: 暖色暗底 + 单一热橙强调色。电影感、终端气质、开发者审美。

monochrome-print.name: Monochrome Print
monochrome-print.description: Off-white paper with ink-black serif text and a single ink-blue accent. High-contrast print magazine vibe — Monocle, Wallpaper, MIT Press. Quiet, sophisticated, considered.
monochrome-print.descriptionZh: 微暖白底 + 墨黑 serif + 单一墙墨蓝强调色. 高对比印刷杂志气质, Monocle / Wallpaper / MIT Press 那种沉静讲究.

neon-cyber.name: Neon Cyber
neon-cyber.description: Deep-navy canvas with electric cyan + magenta glow and Clash Display + Satoshi typography. Signature: cyan grid + dual-tone neon outline. Futurist cyberpunk for AI, web3, security and future-tech content.
neon-cyber.descriptionZh: 深海军底 + 电光青 + 玫红双霓虹 + Clash Display / Satoshi 字体。签名：青色发光网格 + 双色霓虹描边。赛博朋克未来派审美。
bestFor: 赛博朋克 / 科幻话题

newsroom.name: Newsroom
newsroom.description: Newsprint cream backdrop with ink-black serif type and a banner red accent. Old-school broadsheet / documentary feel — feels like a New York Times feature article.
newsroom.descriptionZh: 报纸奶油底 + 墨黑 serif + 报头红强调色. 老派大报 / 纪录片气质, 像一篇 NYT 特稿.

newsroom-v2.name: Newsroom v2
newsroom-v2.description: Newsroom's NYT-broadsheet identity upgraded with Vizplainer-style motion: staggered on-load reveals, hairline tab-underline fills, whisper-soft accent halos and a barely-there warm bloom. Banner-red leads; an ink-blue second hue joins only for sweeps. Quiet, dignified print pace — motion graphics without losing the documentary gravitas.
newsroom-v2.descriptionZh: 在 newsroom 报社气质上叠加 Vizplainer 风动效：错峰入场级联、发丝级 tab 下划线填充、极轻报头红光晕、几乎不可见的暖色环境光。报头红主导，墨蓝作第二色仅用于扫光/光晕。保持大报的安静、庄重节奏，有动效但不失纪录片质感。
bestFor: 需要动效的特稿型视频

paper-press.name: Paper Press
paper-press.description: Warm cream backdrop with a single hot accent. Editorial magazine, gentle, daytime vibe.
paper-press.descriptionZh: 暖色奶油底 + 单一热橙强调色。杂志气质、柔和日间审美。

pastel-dream.name: Pastel Dream
pastel-dream.description: Soft pastel canvas with cream card and a single sage-green accent. Plus Jakarta Sans throughout, generous rounded cards. Signature: faint multi-tone pill ribbon along one edge — friendly without being saccharine.
pastel-dream.descriptionZh: 柔粉蓝灰底 + 奶油卡 + 单一鼠尾草绿强调色 + Plus Jakarta Sans。签名：单边多色 pill 色条。友好但不腻，适合女性向 / 教学 / onboarding。
bestFor: 友好教学 / 知识科普
心理 / 健康 / 母婴

split-canvas.name: Split Canvas
split-canvas.description: Two-tone canvas: warm peach + cool lavender as paired surfaces. Outfit sans display, magenta accent. Signature: dual-tone surface (left peach / right lavender) — built for contrast and dialog chapters.
split-canvas.descriptionZh: 双色画布：暖蜜桃 + 冷薰衣草作为成对底色 + Outfit 几何无衬线 + 玫红强调。签名：双调底色（左桃 / 右紫），适合做对照与对话型章节。

sunset-zine.name: Sunset Zine
sunset-zine.description: Warm peach paper backdrop with a magenta accent and chunky Fraunces serif. Indie magazine / risograph zine vibe — playful, expressive, character-forward.
sunset-zine.descriptionZh: 暖蜗色纸底 + 玫红强调色 + 厚体 Fraunces serif. 独立杂志 / 丝网印 zine 风, 俏皮有人情味.

swiss-ikb.name: Swiss IKB
swiss-ikb.description: Swiss International Style. Ultra-thin 200-weight Inter / Helvetica, crisp warm-white canvas, IKB (International Klein Blue) as the single high-saturation accent. Signature: 1px hairline grid + 200-weight hero numbers. Massimo Vignelli + Helvetica Forever energy.
swiss-ikb.descriptionZh: 瑞士国际主义风。**极细 200 weight** Inter / Helvetica + 净暖白底 + 克莱因蓝（IKB）单一锚点色。签名：1px 发丝网格 + 200 重字 hero 数字。Massimo Vignelli / Helvetica Forever 那种克制冷静。
bestFor: 年度总结 / 数据汇报
设计 / 工程领域分享
严肃学术 / 国际化品牌
信息驱动设计 / 信息图

swiss-ikb-v2.name: Swiss IKB v2
swiss-ikb-v2.nameZh: 瑞士克莱因蓝 · 动效版
swiss-ikb-v2.description: Swiss International Style, motion edition. Keeps the discipline — 200-weight Inter, 1px hairline grid, flat rectangles — and adopts only Vizplainer's PRECISE motion side: crisp metronomic staggered reveals, hairline tab-underline fills, restrained shimmer scans on data surfaces. IKB leads; a cyan second hue gives a two-tone info-design sweep. Glow kept near-zero — precision, not neon.
swiss-ikb-v2.descriptionZh: 瑞士国际主义风的动效版。保留纪律——200 字重 Inter、1px 发丝网格、平直矩形——只吸收 Vizplainer 精确的一面：爽脆、节拍器般的错峰入场、发丝级 tab 下划线填充、数据面板上克制的 shimmer 扫描。克莱因蓝主导，青色作第二色给出双色信息图扫光。光晕几乎为零——精确，而非霓虹。
bestFor: 年度总结 / 数据汇报
设计 / 工程领域分享
信息驱动设计 / 信息图
需要精确动效的数据型视频

terminal-green.name: Terminal Green
terminal-green.description: True-black backdrop with phosphor-green accent and JetBrains Mono everywhere. Matrix / hacker / 80s terminal vibe — best for technical demos and CLI walkthroughs.
terminal-green.descriptionZh: 纯黑底 + 磷光绿强调色, 全程等宽字体. Matrix 黑客 / 80 年代终端感, 最适合技术演示与 CLI 教程.

vintage-editorial.name: Vintage Editorial
vintage-editorial.description: Witty editorial cream canvas with chunky italic Fraunces and a warm terracotta accent. Signature: hairline geometric overlay (circle + line + dot). Personality-forward, conversational — like a magazine columnist who knows you'll laugh.
vintage-editorial.descriptionZh: 奶油底 + 厚体 Fraunces 斜体 + 暖陶强调色，有性格、会说话。签名：细线几何叠层（圆 + 线 + 点）。介于杂志专栏与艺术评论之间，俏皮、自信、有声音。
bestFor: 文化随笔 / 美学话题

warm-keynote.name: Warm Keynote
warm-keynote.description: Cream paper backdrop with a single teal accent and a soft warm grid drawn on the stage. SaaS keynote / editorial vibe.
warm-keynote.descriptionZh: 奶油纸底 + 单一青色强调色 + 舞台上的暖色网格. SaaS Keynote 与编辑器气质.

viz-studio.name: Viz Studio
viz-studio.description: A pure-black studio theme paying homage to Vizplainer-style explainer videos. Single indigo accent (violet is a gradient/glow partner only), restrained glow, and crisp cinematic ease-out built specifically to host the .window-frame skeuomorphic UI primitive — mock terminals, editors, AI-chat panels and data pipelines read like real product surfaces. Accent appears only inside UI state (RUNNING/DONE/winner). The flagship carrier for the window-signature + accent-budget traits.
viz-studio.descriptionZh: 纯黑工作室主题，致敬 Vizplainer 式解释类视频。单一靛蓝强调色（紫罗兰仅作渐变/glow 伙伴），克制的 glow + 精确平滑的电影感 ease-out，专为承载 .window-frame 拟物界面原语而调——模拟终端 / 编辑器 / AI 对话 / 数据流水线读起来像真实产品界面。accent 只在 UI 状态里满格出现（RUNNING/DONE/赢家）。是窗口签名 + 强调色预算两大特质的旗舰承载主题。
bestFor: AIGC / AI 产品解释类视频
技术拆解 / 系统演示
界面 / 流程 / 流水线演示
需要拟物界面演示的章节
